title: Access Rights Information
description: Information specifying access restrictions on content, including legal terms, licensing, access control, and rights enforcement specifications as defined in submission agreements.

definitions.definition: Information specifying access restrictions on content, including legal terms, licensing, access control, and rights enforcement specifications as defined in submission agreements.
definitions.sources:
- [Reference Model for an Open Archival Information System (OAIS), Recommended Practice CCSDS 650.0-M-2, Magenta Book 2012](https://public.ccsds.org/pubs/650x0m2.pdf)
- NESDIS Data Management Lexicon and Related Terms
